nasb.text: How boastful you are about the valleys! Your valley is flowing away, O backsliding daughter Who trusts in her treasures, saying, ‘Who will come against me?’

esv.text: Why do you boast of your valleys, O faithless daughter, who trusted in her treasures, saying, ‘Who will come against me?’

cnv.text: 背道的居民哪！ 你們為甚麼因有山谷， 就是你們那肥沃的山谷而誇口呢？ 你們十分倚靠自己的財寶，說： ‘有誰敢來攻擊我們呢？’

ccb.text: 背叛的人民啊， 你们为肥沃的山谷而感到自豪吗？ 你们依仗财富以为无人敢来侵犯。”
